mapper.insert: insert into tb_address (customer_id, name, tel, province, city, district, region_code, detail, is_default) values ( #{customerId}, #{name}, #{tel}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{regionCode}, #{detail}, #{isDefault} )
mapper.update: update tb_address set name = #{name}, tel = #{tel}, province = #{province}, city = #{city}, district = #{district}, region_code = #{regionCode}, detail = #{detail} where id = #{id} and customer_id = #{customerId}
mapper.select: select id, name, tel, province, city, district, region_code, detail from tb_address where customer_id = #{customerId} and is_default = 1
select id, name, tel, province, city, district, detail, is_default from tb_address where customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, id;
